details.redacted_summary: - 初步结论：当前不是“Feishu 完全收不到消息”，而是至少存在群聊未满足 @ 触发条件的问题；若用户感知为“机器人不回复”，还需继续区分是否有会话卡住/模型无产出。 - ironclaw templates 记录到的环境背景： - 受保护配置（如 `openclaw.json`、channel config）修改前要先说明、确认、备份； - 不要擅自 `openclaw update` 或替用户重启/停止 Gateway； - Feishu/Lark 诊断时应优先结合 `pm2 list`、gateway 健康、近期 Feishu dispatch 日志综合判断，不应仅凭单点 CLI 探针下结论。

triage.rationale: The redacted summary contains general project troubleshooting guidance and operational cautions without raw logs, credentials, personal identifiers, or private message content. Team scope still implies review-only under policy.
suggested_redactions: Remove or generalize internal source references and hashes before broader release
Avoid exposing exact internal file/config paths beyond generic config names if not necessary
Keep any raw Feishu dispatch logs, channel identifiers, or user mentions excluded
triage.release_summary: Investigation indicated the issue was not a complete messaging outage; at least one group conversation likely did not meet the required mention-based trigger condition. If users still perceive the bot as nonresponsive, continue separating trigger/routing issues from stalled sessions or missing model output. For chat-platform diagnostics, validate process status, gateway health, and recent dispatch activity together rather than relying on a single command-line probe.
triage.reusable_lesson: Before changing protected bot or channel configuration, explain the plan, obtain confirmation, create a backup, and avoid unsupervised updates or restarts.
triage.residual_risk: Further checks may be needed to distinguish trigger failures from runtime or model-output failures.
